decision_gates: Stop before reintroducing Markdown under docs.
Stop before changing API field names without updating HTML docs, Pydantic schemas, TypeScript contracts, and OpenAPI.
Stop before splitting blocked modules across multiple agents when they share the same API, DB, state-machine, index-pipeline, prompt, or trace context.
Stop before deleting embedded raw Markdown backups from HTML pages unless a better lossless source exists.
Stop before removing docs/handoff/context-state.json or assets required by agent-context-html validation.
